# 014_十二诸侯年表

《史记》第 14 篇 · 表

*查看原文*: [/chapters/014_十二诸侯年表.html](/chapters/014_十二诸侯年表.html)

## 章节综述

幽厉之後，周室衰微，诸侯专政，春秋有所不纪；而谱牒经略，五霸更盛衰，欲睹周世相先後之意，

**章节结构**

- **太史公读史**：太史公读春秋历谱谍，至周厉王，未尝不废书而叹也。
- **太史公曰**：太史公曰：儒者断其义，驰说者骋其辞，
- **表**：| | 年 | 周 | 鲁 | 齐 |

## 主要实体

**人物**：[[孔子]] · [重耳](../entities/person.html#entity-重耳) · [阳虎](../entities/person.html#entity-阳虎) · [赵鞅](../entities/person.html#entity-赵鞅) · [公孙无知](../entities/person.html#entity-公孙无知) · [华元](../entities/person.html#entity-华元) · [子产](../entities/person.html#entity-子产) · [庆封](../entities/person.html#entity-庆封) · [陈厉公](../entities/person.html#entity-陈厉公) · [州吁](../entities/person.html#entity-州吁) · [晋武公](../entities/person.html#entity-晋武公) · [卫惠公](../entities/person.html#entity-卫惠公)

**地点**：[曲沃](../entities/place.html#entity-曲沃) · [彭城](../entities/place.html#entity-彭城) · [许田](../entities/place.html#entity-许田) · [河上](../entities/place.html#entity-河上) · [殽](../entities/place.html#entity-殽) · [朝歌](../entities/place.html#entity-朝歌) · [河](../entities/place.html#entity-河) · [章华](../entities/place.html#entity-章华) · [郢](../entities/place.html#entity-郢) · [橐皋](../entities/place.html#entity-橐皋)

**邦国**：[晋](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-晋) · [楚](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-楚) · [齐](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-齐) · [郑](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-郑) · [吴](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-吴) · [宋](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-宋)
